calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-20-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-22-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Clifton Inohara, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Ford Motor Credit Company, LLC.
Diana Shiba, Financial Services Specialist for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Empress Z. Azzem.
Default was entered against defendant on April 3, 2009. Amended Default was entered on March 5, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on March 5, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Ford Motor Credit Company, LLC, and against the Defaulted Defendant Empress Z. Azzem as follows:

Damages/Principal - $47,863.98.
Prejudgment Interest - $6,785.94.
Attorney's Fees - $1,125.00.
Costs - $425.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $56,199.92.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
